name: rewire
description: 21 AI coaching skills that turn wisdom traditions into interactive practice — Stoicism, ACT, DBT, IFS, Zen, Sufism, Ubuntu, and more. Each skill is a full coaching protocol an AI agent can load.

plugins.name: rewire
plugins.description: 21 AI coaching skills spanning ancient wisdom (Stoicism, Confucianism, Zen, Sufism, Vedanta, Epicureanism), modern psychology (ACT, DBT, IFS, Positive Psychology, Existential Therapy), creative recovery, and cultural philosophies (Ubuntu, Ikigai, Wabi-Sabi). Each skill is a full interactive coaching protocol with lessons, exercises, check-ins, and milestones.
